name: Ghost Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the almond bark according to package instructions.
2. Dip two-thirds of each cookie into the melted candy, gently shaking off excess coating.
3. Place the coated cookies on a wire rack supported by waxed paper.
4. For the eyes, cut the jelly beans in half and place them on the cookies.
5. Allow the cookies to cool completely before removing them from the rack.
